_emit_rules.purpose: Fillable template for Stage -1.2 (D-1.2) stdout JSON. The agent reads this file, fills placeholders, and emits exactly one JSON object as the last non-empty line of stdout. Field semantics for SC10/SC11 transcripts, motif codes, etc. are defined in stage_neg1_2_core.txt and are NOT duplicated here.
how_to_fill: Replace every string value whose payload starts with 'TODO:' with the actual content. The text after 'TODO:' is the inline hint for that field.

Arrays in this template contain exactly ONE prototype object as their first element. Duplicate the prototype per real item, fill TODOs in each copy. If the result has zero items for that array, emit [] (drop the prototype).
Drop the top-level '_emit_rules' key before emitting.
- mode=='revise' MUST OMIT: literature_map, seeds, seed_details, prior_work_summary (they were emitted at v1 of this angle and inherited by the orchestrator).
- mode!='revise' MUST OMIT: addressed_flags (only meaningful when patching a prior reviewer verdict).

- SC10_focal_object_exhibited / SC11_proof_route_non_trivial accept 'n/a -- field-tier' when none of your flagship-aspirant headlines exist; otherwise paste the full transcript / step-list per the discipline defined in stage_neg1_2_core.txt (sections SC10 and SC11). Vague one-liners are treated as FAIL.
Validity: the emitted object must be valid JSON, single object, last non-empty line of stdout, no prose wrapper, no markdown fences.

status: TODO: 'completed' if proposal is ready for Stage -0.5 review; 'needs-pivot' if the angle failed Step 1b literature triangulation (<3 prior-art candidates) and should be pivoted without running the reviewer
message: TODO: one-line summary of the headline theorem/conjecture
literature_map: TODO [cold-start + pivot only — OMIT for revise]: 10-15 line Step 0a summary of named papers + tensions/open-problems/phenomena, collapsed to one string with literal '\n' between lines
seeds: TODO [cold-start + pivot only]: one seed in F2 phenomenon form (one line)

seed_details._prototype: repeat this object per seed in the 'seeds' array; positions must align
seed_details.one_line: TODO: F2 phenomenon-form statement (must match the corresponding entry in 'seeds' exactly)

anchor_paper.author: TODO: first-author surname or 'et al.' string
anchor_paper.location: TODO: section / equation / page reference. REQUIRED when target_tier == 'flagship'; else 'n/a'
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: TODO: <=120-char verbatim quote from the paper at the location above. REQUIRED when target_tier == 'flagship' and anchor type in (a)(c)(d)(e); for type (b) the prior-proposal excerpt supplies the quote; field/subfield-tier may use 'n/a'

seed_details.strict_delta: TODO: F4b sentence when target_tier == 'flagship'; else 'n/a'
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: TODO: F4b PASS one-liner OR 'lands; downgrade target_tier to field' (flagship only; else 'n/a')
seed_details.motif: TODO: math-shape code, set at EVERY tier -- M1..M17 | 'multi (e.g. M1+M8)' | 'none'. See stage_neg1_2_motif_library.txt (cold-start only) or inherit from cold-start seed_details on pivot. This is the seed's mathematical shape, NOT its tier ambition.
seed_details.target_tier: TODO: tier ambition (drives F4b/F4c/F5 + flagship floor gates) -- 'flagship' | 'field' | 'subfield'. Independent of 'motif': a 'field' seed may still carry an M1..M17 motif.

adversarial_referee._prototype: repeat this object 3 times per seed (3 distinct adversarial objections required)
adversarial_referee.shape: TODO: one of {floor-violation, iff-direction, joint-family-unnamed, motif-mismatch, sufficiency-trap, anchor-drift, comparator-mischar, witness-degenerate}
adversarial_referee.instance: TODO: <=25 words, the specific objection for this seed
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: TODO: one-line rebuttal OR honest admission 'lands; downgrade to <tier>'

prior_work_summary: TODO [cold-start + pivot only]: 5-10 line in-repo summary from Step 1a, collapsed to one string

soundness_self_review._doc: Each SCk field is a one-liner unless noted. SC10 and SC11 are FULL multi-line transcripts for flagship-aspirant headlines (see SC10/SC11 sections in stage_neg1_2_core.txt for the required transcript shape). 'n/a -- field-tier' is acceptable for SC10/SC11 when no flagship-aspirant headline exists.
soundness_self_review.SC4_intro_kernel_matches_section8: TODO: PASS/FAIL one-liner; covers section4-P4 <-> section8 coherence
soundness_self_review.SC6_comparator_promise: TODO: PASS/FAIL one-liner; full table goes in 'comparator_promise_table' below
soundness_self_review.SC7_flagship_floor_self_screen: TODO: PASS/FAIL one-liner self-screening the headline against the reviewer's flagship floors (no definitional-unfold iff; ε/τ/δ bounded by a named section7 constant; generic-class claim has a concrete non-corner section9 witness). 'n/a -- field-tier' when no headline is flagship-aspirant. (Folds the former SC7/SC8/SC9.)
soundness_self_review.SC10_focal_object_exhibited: TODO [flagship-aspirant: paste the FULL Exhibit transcript per focal object: defining equation, RHS-symbol provenance (section6 RAW / section7 ASSUMED / derived), substituted equation, computed value, cross-check via different algebraic ordering, every invariant check with LHS=/RHS=/OK|FAIL, assumption-substitution screen. End with 'SC10 verdict: PASS' or 'SC10 verdict: FAIL -- <reason>'. Multi-line string; embed literal '\n'. Field-tier: 'n/a -- field-tier'. See SC10 spec in stage_neg1_2_core.txt.]
soundness_self_review.SC11_proof_route_non_trivial: TODO [flagship-aspirant: paste the FULL numbered step list per headline: Step 0a unfolds, Step 0b assumption applications, Step 1..k substantive steps (one line each, naming the lemma / reduction / construction), closing classical result, then 'k = <int>; PASS iff k >= 3'. End with 'SC11 verdict: PASS' or 'SC11 verdict: FAIL -- <reason>'. Multi-line. Field-tier: 'n/a -- field-tier'. See SC11 spec in stage_neg1_2_core.txt.]
soundness_self_review.SC12_open_ended_question_discipline: TODO: 'n/a -- no Open-ended Questions' OR one line per OEQ confirming Handle + Why-it-matters are present AND Handle names a concrete starting move (not bare research-area phrasing) AND OEQ also enters section4 Paragraph 4 with Gap + Consumer
soundness_self_review.SC13_inference_conjecture_discipline: TODO: 'n/a -- no estimator/inference result' OR one line per estimator/inference (M8-rung) result giving its label (Conjecture | Open-ended Question) and PASS/FAIL against (A) constructed-not-asserted, (B) atomic-single-claim, (C) free-parameters-pinned, (D) regime-complete. See SC13 in stage_neg1_2_core.txt.

open_ended_questions._prototype: repeat this object per Open-ended Question N block in section8; emit [] if none
open_ended_questions.label: TODO: 'oeq:<slug>' matching the \label in the .tex
open_ended_questions.title: TODO: one-line title matching the bracketed title in \begin{openendedquestion}[Open-ended Question N: <title>]
open_ended_questions.statement: TODO: one-line question statement, verbatim from the OEQ body
open_ended_questions.handle: TODO: one-line concrete starting move (named technique + named target object, OR named decomposition + Riesz/representation framework + missing object, OR named candidate framework + the missing piece). NOT a bare research-area phrasing.
open_ended_questions.why_it_matters: TODO: one sentence on downstream use

comparator_promise_table._prototype: repeat per comparator named in abstract / section4 P2; SC6 requires every comparator promise be matched, downgraded, or dropped
comparator_promise_table.comparator_claim: TODO: one-line verbatim summary of the published result this proposal targets
comparator_promise_table.matched_by: TODO: 'Conjecture N' | 'Theorem N' | 'unmatched: see SC6 reconciliation'
comparator_promise_table.match_kind: TODO: one of {strict_tightening, iff_frontier, equivalence, non_representability, downgraded_to_informed_by, dropped_from_abstract}

novelty_justification.repo_axis: TODO: one paragraph naming closest in-catalogue CausalSmith proposal(s) (qid + headline statement) and the gap. Do NOT cite Lean files (file.lean:thm_name) -- Lean substrate is not the novelty axis at this stage.
novelty_justification.published_axis: TODO: one paragraph naming closest published papers (bibkey + claim) and the gap

literature_checklist._prototype: 4-10 entries; each must include the WHY field 'relevant_to'. Loose entries without WHY do NOT count toward the 4-paper minimum.
literature_checklist.author: TODO: first author or 'et al.' string
literature_checklist.relevant_to: TODO: 'Theorem N' | 'Conjecture N' | 'Open-ended Question N' (the section8 statement this paper is closest to)

statement_labels._prototype: one entry per section8 numbered result
statement_labels.label: TODO: 'Theorem 1' | 'Conjecture 1' | 'Open-ended Question 1' | ...

artifacts: TODO: absolute path of the proposal .tex you wrote (must equal 'proposal_path' above)
